plugins.name: browzer
plugins.description: Hybrid vector + Graph RAG search across indexed codebases and document workspaces, powered by the browzer CLI. Fourteen SKILLs covering install/auth, workspace + doc ingestion, code + markdown search, dependency graph, async ingestion polling, workspace management, and an end-to-end PRD-to-merge dev workflow (prd → task → execute → commit → sync).
